name: Carlos Santana
abstract: Carlos Humberto Santana Barragán (Spanish: [ˈkaɾlos umˈbeɾto sanˈtana βaraˈɣan] ; born July 20, 1947) is a Mexican and American guitarist, best known as a founding member of the rock band Santana. Born and raised in Mexico where he developed his musical background, he rose to fame in the late 1960s and early 1970s in the United States wi…

concerts.label: Sri Chinmoy: An Evening of Spiritual Music
The New York Pops 41st Birthday Gala
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: Carlos Santana was there... Later on, we talked about it... He and I have been talking on the phone about the human...the development of the humanitarian
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Shorter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: Santana loves what we do but it doesn’t necessarily follow from the hi-hat on two and four and the bass drum on four beats.
